You are working on the Localess Angular frontend.

Read these docs before making changes:
- [Frontend Architecture](../docs/frontend-architecture.md) — routing, modules, libs/ui, Firebase setup
- [Frontend State](../docs/frontend-state.md) — NgRx Signal stores, how to read/update state
- [User Permissions](../docs/frontend-permissions.md) — roles, guards, UI conditionals

Key locations:
- Feature routes: `src/app/features/`
- Shared stores: `src/app/shared/stores/`
- Shared services: `src/app/shared/services/`
- UI components: `libs/ui/`
- Models: `src/app/shared/models/`
